text.title: Architecture Decision Records (ADRs) Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the architecture-decision-records methodology end-to-end.

step.name: scope
step.action: Decide if the choice is architecturally significant (cross-cutting, hard-to-reverse, affects ≥2 teams). If not, skip.
step.decision-gate: If not significant, emit skip-record and STOP.

step.name: alternatives
step.decision-gate: If only 1 option listed, refuse — single-option ADR is decision laundering.

step.name: draft
step.action: Fill templates/adr-nygard.md or adr-madr.md per ADR-0001 lock.

step.name: review
step.action: Time-box PR review to 1 week (24h for urgent); reviewer signs off or requests one round of changes.
step.decision-gate: If review stalls > 1 week, escalate to architect.

step.name: merge
step.action: Merge to docs/adr/; update ADR index; tag status: Accepted with merge-commit hash.
